name: the-machine
description: Reusable Claude Code plugins — brand-agnostic skills, agents, and MCP configs.

plugins.name: email-marketing
plugins.description: Per-brand email marketing agent team — weekly newsletter production: trend research with a deduplicated topic log, brand-voiced copywriting (subject + A/B variants, preview text, email-safe HTML body), Higgsfield image generation, adversarial QA, and draft delivery to Mailchimp, Klaviyo, Constant Contact, Omnisend, Moosend, or MoeGo. Drafts only — never sends.

plugins.name: human-resources
plugins.description: Per-client HR department — a brand-agnostic team of skills and agents covering the full HR lifecycle: recruitment, onboarding, compensation & benefits, performance management, training, employee & labor relations, legal compliance, policy/handbook development, health-safety-wellness, DEI, employee records/HRIS, scheduling, workforce strategy, and offboarding. Produces review-ready drafts and reports into the client project — never final legal advice, never sends, never mutates live employee systems without explicit confirmation.
